# requirements.txt — generated by gen_requirements.py
# Versions reflect what's currently installed in the active environment.

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# torch is NOT pinned here — install it from the CUDA wheel index that
# matches your driver, e.g.:
#
#     pip install torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128
#
# (Use cu121 / cu118 for older drivers, or drop the --index-url flag for
# the CPU-only build.) Then re-run ``python gen_requirements.py`` so the
# installed torch version is recorded in the comment below.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
